description: Mini-MTEB ordered triplets (SPEC-vector-routing-v0 §4) to MEASURE the routing embedder per language. embedding_reliability[lang] = fraction of triplets where cos(anchor,positive) > cos(anchor,negative). Net-validated common-knowledge semantic relations; positive = meaning-preserving paraphrase, negative = unrelated sentence of similar length (probes semantics, not surface). Parallel content across fr/zh/en. Characterizes the embedder model class, NOT the competence tree.

en.anchor: A dog is a domestic animal that barks.
en.negative: The stock market fell sharply today.

en.anchor: Paris is the capital of France.
en.positive: The capital city of France is Paris.

en.anchor: Water boils at one hundred degrees Celsius at sea level.
en.positive: At sea level, water reaches its boiling point at 100 degrees Celsius.
en.negative: The novel was written in the nineteenth century.

en.anchor: The sun rises in the east.
en.positive: Each morning the sun appears in the east.
en.negative: He bought a new pair of running shoes.

en.anchor: Photosynthesis lets plants make food from sunlight.
en.positive: Plants use sunlight to produce their own food.
en.negative: The train was delayed by twenty minutes.

en.positive: Every triangle is a three-sided polygon.
en.negative: She enjoys listening to jazz music.

en.anchor: The heart pumps blood through the body.
en.positive: Blood is circulated around the body by the heart.
en.negative: Mount Everest is the tallest mountain on Earth.

en.positive: When water freezes it turns into ice.
en.negative: The committee approved the annual budget.

fr.negative: Il a acheté une nouvelle paire de chaussures.

fr.positive: Les plantes utilisent la lumière du soleil pour produire leur nourriture.
fr.negative: Le train a eu vingt minutes de retard.

fr.positive: Tout triangle est un polygone à trois côtés.
fr.negative: Elle aime écouter de la musique jazz.

fr.anchor: Le cœur pompe le sang dans le corps.
fr.positive: Le sang est mis en circulation dans le corps par le cœur.
fr.negative: L'Everest est la plus haute montagne de la Terre.

fr.anchor: La glace est de l'eau gelée.
fr.positive: Quand l'eau gèle, elle se transforme en glace.

zh.negative: 光合作用把阳光转化为能量。

zh.anchor: 在海平面上水在一百摄氏度沸腾。
zh.positive: 在海平面，水在一百摄氏度达到沸点。
zh.negative: 这部小说写于十九世纪。

zh.positive: 每天早晨太阳出现在东方。

zh.positive: 植物利用阳光来制造自己的食物。
